name: Food Shops
mission: Sustaining the city with high-quality culinary experiences.
vision: A thriving competitive market of restaurants, food trucks, and premium dining.

basic: Restaurants must maintain active stock via delivery jobs.
Give standard RP for cooking and serving animations.
advanced: Food poisoning RP can occur if expired items are sold.
Franchising is allowed given proper city permits.

roles.name: Restaurant Owner
roles.desc: Oversees the menu pricing and ingredient logistics.

roles.name: Head Chef
roles.desc: Manages food preparation and quality control.

roles.name: Line Cook
roles.desc: Handles the bulk of cooking orders from the front.

roles.name: Cashier / Server
roles.desc: Frontline customer service and delivery handler.
